name: api-gateway
description: BFF API gateway opt-in. The proxy is the in-app gateway service (apps/api/gateway: proxy.ts + token-cache.ts, spec 004), already present in the base app, and its service-to-service OAuth secrets (GATEWAY_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID / GATEWAY_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET) are already declared by the base (apps/api/lib/secrets.ts + infra.config.json) - so this module contributes no secrets of its own. It documents the private-backend config knobs and contributes the frontend /connectivity test page. No apps/api/src/** payload under Encore.

PRIVATE_API_BASE_URL.description: Private backend base URL the gateway proxies to (include the API path prefix, e.g. https://private-api.example.com/api/v1)

GATEWAY_TIMEOUT_MS.description: Gateway proxy request timeout in ms
